overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a Viking settlement. The character enters through a wooden palisade gate, walks through the village center with thatched-roof buildings, and explores the waterfront area with wooden docks, fish markets, and beached longships.

events.description: character passes through the wooden gate arch into the settlement interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through the wooden palisade gate into the village

entered.detail: tall defensive wall made of vertical wooden logs with green ivy growing on top
large arched entrance made of thick wooden timbers with a small roof structure
elevated wooden tower with stairs and a yellow banner hanging from the side
red cloth banner hanging from the palisade wall
traditional wooden longhouse with steep thatched roof visible through the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wooden palisade gate of a Viking settlement. The camera follows from behind as the character passes under the large wooden archway, with a watchtower visible to the right and red banners hanging on the walls. The scene transitions from outside to inside the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main street with wooden longhouses

agents.ego_description: walking along the central dirt path through the village, passing wooden buildings and carts

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on a wooden crate near barrels on the right side of the path

entered.detail: wooden wagon with large wheels parked in the village center
wooden framework structure against a building under construction or repair
tall wooden pole with tattered fabric flags fluttering in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the village center along a dirt path lined with wooden longhouses featuring thatched roofs. A wooden cart sits in the middle of the path ahead, and scaffolding is visible on the right. The settlement appears active but not crowded, with one villager sitting near barrels on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock and shoreline with fishing equipment

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto wooden dock planks near the water
moving from wooden dock onto gravel shoreline near beached ships

agents.ego_description: exploring the waterfront area, walking along the dock and examining the fish market stalls

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the fish display table arranging goods

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a pier extending over the water
wooden table displaying various fish and seafood for market
large round wicker baskets stacked near the fish stall
large wooden Viking ship with carved prow pulled up on the shore
small wooden structure with thatched roof near the beached ships

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the village street onto a wooden dock extending over the water. The area features a fish market with display tables and woven baskets. The character explores the dock then moves onto the gravel shore where a large Viking longship is beached. A wooden boat shed stands nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier walkway along the water

events.description: character turns slightly right while crossing the wooden pier toward the moored ships

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier walkway overlooking the water, passing moored longships

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress standing on the dock looking out at the water

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with railings extending along the waterfront
large Viking longship with red and wood finish moored alongside the pier
thick wooden posts used for tying boats, sticking up from the water
tall wooden crane used for loading and unloading ships

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden pier extending over the water, with a large moored Viking longship visible to the right. The pier features wooden mooring posts and overlooks the calm water. In the distance, a wooden crane structure stands on the left, and a woman stands on the dock looking out at the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from the fortified entrance of a Viking settlement out toward its bustling waterfront. It begins as the character passes under a large wooden palisade gate flanked by a watchtower and red banners, transitioning from the outskirts into the heart of the village. As the character advances along a dirt path, the scene opens up to reveal thatched-roof longhouses, scaffolding, and a wooden cart positioned in the center of the street. The camera then shifts from the village center onto a wooden dock filled with fish market tables and woven baskets before moving across a gravel shore toward a beached longship and a nearby boat shed. Finally, the movement extends along a wooden pier overlooking calm waters, passing mooring posts and a moored longship toward a distant crane and a figure gazing out at the sea.
